issues.description: Missing condition to check for card reveal requirement. DSL must include condition checking for 'Whitebeard Pirates' type card in hand before allowing activation.

Missing action to return revealed card to top of deck. Official text requires 'place the revealed card at the top of your deck' which should be a SearchDeck or equivalent action targeting the revealed card.
Trigger should include cost/condition context. The activation requires revealing a card as a cost, which must be modeled before DrawCard executes.
